scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: cd server && uv run python -m app
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test:api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: cd server && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.typecheck:api: cd server && uv run mypy app
